title: Eclipse
description: Purple Pack for PvP, UHC and HCF.
body:
# Eclipse 16x PvP Texture Pack

**Eclipse** is a high-quality, optimized Minecraft PVP pack tailored specifically for 1.8.9 PVP players. Crafted with precision by **nikinok** and **iTzDrakthar**, this pack transforms your game into a visually stunning battlefield.

## 📦 **Features**

- ✨ **Custom Particles**
- 🗡️ **Custom Weapon Textures**
- 🐾 **Custom Entity Models**
- 🧱 **Custom Blocks**
- 🎞️ **Custom Animations**
- 🌌 **Custom Day/Night Sky**
- 🔊 **Custom Sounds**

[![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/2214083e-89b0-4b45-8aa0-d262c4255507.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/nikinok)

**Game Version:** 1.7 - 1.8.9  
**Optimized:** FPS BOOST ✔️
